spec_ref: VT100-UG DEC private mode 47 alternate screen
notes: Mode 47 saves the primary screen, uses an alternate buffer, and restores primary content on reset.

spec_ref: ctlseqs: DEC private mode 1047 alternate screen
notes: Mode 1047 restores the primary buffer after alternate-screen use.

spec_ref: ctlseqs: DEC private mode 1049 alternate screen
notes: Mode 1049 restores the primary buffer after alternate-screen use.

spec_ref: VT100-UG SGR; DEC private mode 47 alternate screen
notes: Guard: inverse video must not leak onto fresh text after an alt-screen round trip.

spec_ref: VT100-UG SGR; ctlseqs: mode 1047 alternate screen
notes: Guard: inverse video must not leak through a 1047 alt-screen switch.

spec_ref: VT100-UG SGR; ctlseqs: mode 1049 alternate screen
notes: Guard: inverse video must not leak through a 1049 alt-screen switch.

spec_ref: VT100-UG SGR; ctlseqs: mode 1049 alternate screen
notes: Exact pager repro: a pager enters the alt screen (?1049h), draws an inverse status line, and quits (?1049l) with inverse still selected. The restored shell text must render normal, the alt-screen status line must be gone, and the parser's attr_inverse must be cleared. Fails against firmware that leaves inverse selected across the rmcup transition.

spec_ref: ctlseqs: DEC private mode 1049 alternate screen
notes: Mode 1049 restores the primary cursor position as well as primary screen contents.
